description: Characters defined by their trade, craft, or professional function in society.
roles: Merchant
A gatekeeper of vital supplies, turning every transaction into a negotiation that reveals the local economy and its power players.
Craftsman
Skilled hands capable of forging what the protagonists need, but the price is always time, rare materials, or a favor owed.
Scholar
Locked knowledge the protagonists cannot decipher alone, traded for errands pulling them into academic rivalries or forbidden archives.
Healer
The thin line between the protagonists and death -- a lifeline whose loss would change the calculus of every future battle.
Innkeeper
Every rumor heard and every traveler seen, quietly steering the protagonists toward the next danger through idle gossip.
Guide
Survival in unfamiliar lands held hostage to trust and coin, knowing terrain the protagonists desperately do not.
Guard
Enforced boundaries the protagonists must cross, turning locked gates and patrol routes into puzzles of persuasion or stealth.
Spy
Secrets traded like currency, pulling the protagonists into a web where one whispered name can topple plans or confirm suspicions.
Diplomat
Political tensions navigated where swords cannot reach, opening -- or closing -- doors the protagonists need with a single word.
Entertainer
Reputation spread through song and story, shaping how the world perceives the protagonists before they ever arrive.
